description: MemoPilot IQ evaluation scenarios. Each scenario seeds setup messages, then asks a test question. The benchmark compares a memory-augmented agent against a no-memory baseline.

scenarios.title: Preference recall
setup_messages: I prefer a FastAPI backend and a React + Vite frontend. I like short, practical answers.
scenarios.test_question: What backend framework should I use for my new service?

scenarios.title: Cross-session project decision recall
setup_messages: This project is for the Qwen Hackathon Track 1 MemoryAgent.
We will deploy the backend on Alibaba Cloud.
scenarios.test_question: Remind me what this project is and where we deploy it.

scenarios.title: Contradiction / supersession test
setup_messages: Use React + Vite for the frontend.
Actually, I changed my mind. Use Next.js instead of React + Vite.
scenarios.test_question: What frontend stack should I use now?

scenarios.title: Expired deadline test
setup_messages: Temporary note: the staging server is down today only.
scenarios.test_question: Is the staging server still down?

scenarios.title: Critical memory recall
setup_messages: Never commit API keys to the repository. This is critical.
scenarios.test_question: Write me a quick deployment checklist.

scenarios.title: No-memory vs memory-agent comparison
setup_messages: I prefer FastAPI, React + Vite, Alibaba Cloud, light UI, and short answers.
scenarios.test_question: Design the backend architecture for my project.
